response:
TEXT  
THE FRAME OF THE BIKE HAS A BASE WEIGHT OF W KILOGRAMS. EACH ADVANCED COMPONENT ADDS TO THE FRAME A WEIGHT REDUCTION OF 2%. IF ALEX ADDS N ADVANCED COMPONENTS, THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME, W F, IS EXPRESSED AS W MINUS 2% OF W MINUS N.  
THE MINIMUM NUMBER OF ADVANCED COMPONENTS, N, ALEX SHOULD ADD TO THE BIKE TO MEET THE DESIRED ENERGY EXPENDITURE REDUCTION IS 5. THE WORD CLOCK APPEARS AT LEAST THREE TIMES. THE ENERGY EXPENDITURE REDUCTION, E, IS MODELED BY THE FUNCTION E(N) = 1 MINUS (1 MINUS 0.02) POWER N. THE MINIMUM NUMBER OF ADVANCED COMPONENTS IS 5. THE WORD CLOCK APPEARS AT LEAST THREE TIMES.
